endpoints.description: Main lead contact form endpoint. Standardizes and forwards visitor details via Resend API to design@puretechnology.in and shravan.shinde@puretechnology.in.

functions.name: submitContactForm
functions.params: ContactPayload (key-value pair map of form entries)
functions.behavior: Sends POST request to /api/contact and throws Error on failure.

hireRoles.description: Contains metadata for developers roles available to hire. Indexed by slugs like 'ai-developers', 'android-developers', etc.

subServices.description: Contains detailed services metadata indexed by sub-service slug.

caseStudies.description: Contains lists of case studies mapped to subServices slug and mainServices key.

teamContacts.description: Contains members list for navigation and linkedin links.

routes.description: Main Landing Page. Features a hero carousel, YouTube showreel embed, case studies summaries, core value propositions, customer reviews, and a CTA section.
About company history, convictions, executive team, customer testimonials, and main consulting CTA.
Displays timeline, milestones, certificates, and highlights of Pure Technology.
Parent layout route for career-related routes.
Careers landing page. Lists active open positions (e.g. .NET Fresher) and handles jobs application mailto link.
Highlights workplace culture, insurance benefits, professional growth, and lifestyle perks.
Photo gallery and team outing showcase of Pure Technology culture.
Directory of case studies. Displays a list of all client achievements (Bridgestone, CEAT, Schindler, Sandvik, Tata AutoComp, PCDA, etc.).

Case study details route. NOTE: Currently reads raw data from sessionStorage.getItem('caseStudy') which breaks on direct refresh or deep linking. Integration with TanStack Loaders or API is required to fetch details dynamically.
Main contact page. Features direct phone/email contact numbers, addresses, and the ContactForm submitting to /api/contact.
Portfolio/gallery section displaying office culture, awards, and events.
Company mission statement, vision for future, and core operational values.
Grid of team members showing photos, names, and roles.
Fallback dynamic hiring page loader. Feeds from src/lib/hire-roles.ts using the parameter slug.
Fallback dynamic service sub-page loader. Feeds from src/lib/sub-services.ts.
Specific sub-service pages. Import main service case studies and include specialized TechnologyExpertiseSection cards for roles.
Specific hiring roles landing pages. Render via HireRolePage using role-specific configurations.

site.ConsultationSection.tsx: Submits name, email, phone, company, requirements to submitContactForm.
site.FirstVisitEnquiryModal.tsx: A popup modal appearing after a delay. Submits visitor details and service selections.
site.Header.tsx: Global navigation menu. Integrates links for About, Services, Case Studies, Careers, and Contact.
site.Footer.tsx: Global footer with links, email address, address details, and direct contact numbers.
site.HireRolePage.tsx: Layout wrapper for hire developer pages.
site.ServicePage.tsx: Layout wrapper for main service categories.
site.SubServicePage.tsx: Layout wrapper for dynamic sub-service pages.
site.Primitives.tsx: Hosts UI building blocks like BrandIconBox, BrandTitle, PageHero, PrimaryButton, GhostButton, SectionHeader, ClientMarquee, Testimonial, CaseStudyCard, and CTASection.
